No and Type of package : 1 Package

Insuranc 0.0

Description of Goods Customs Value $ EC Tariff No . Weight ( kg ) Supplementary
i , the undersigned , LA TOYA VICTOR ( FREIGHT 23.00 US ) do hereby declare that the above particulars are true and correct .
